dialogDescription: These keys apply to every canvas. They are saved in this browser and mirrored to a local cookie so canvas execution routes can read them.
intro: Add at least one provider key. Use OpenRouter for text, Replicate for image or video models, and Cyberbara for media generation or uploads.
storageIntro: Storage is optional. Enable Cyberbara uploads or your own S3-compatible bucket when you want local file uploads inside canvas nodes.
readyIntro: Your setup is global. New and existing canvases will use these keys without any Cyberbara account, hosted database, or credits system.
skipWarning: You can skip for now, but generation will require a provider key.
